creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
liferea 1.10.11 is out:
http://lzone.de/Liferea-1.10.11-Released

Straightforward upgrade.
Please note that files/patch-src_fl-sources_json-api-mapper.c is not needed anymore, so the whole files directory is gone.
